claim: Kanban is a source-present Beta candidate only. It is not Stable and has no physical mobile assistive-technology, package-parity, release, or complete conformance claim.

semantics.nativeBasis: Named column sections contain ordered card lists with native handles, move buttons, and destination selects.
semantics.drag: Native pointer drag is additive; every move has explicit buttons and destination controls, and keyboard pickup can be cancelled.
semantics.maturity: A visible Beta label and data-maturity=beta remain present in every mode.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through view, retry, undo, card handles, move buttons, and destination controls in document order.
Picks up the focused handle; a second activation drops the card.
Moves a picked card within its column.
Moves a picked card across spatial columns and mirrors under RTL.
Cancels keyboard movement and restores the original complete board state.

enhancementIsolation.wipStatusFalse: No capacity text or status signal exists; WIP rejection remains a policy safety check.
enhancementIsolation.mobileListFalse: No view group, pressed state, list state, or presentation event exists.
enhancementIsolation.announcementsFalse: No live region or announcement state update exists.
enhancementIsolation.undoFalse: No snapshots, Undo control, undo callback reason, or undo announcement exists.
enhancementIsolation.serverFalse: No promise, pending state, persistence call, retry UI, rollback, or server error exists.
enhancementIsolation.virtualFalse: Every card renders; no spacers, range controls, or window callbacks exist.

preferences.forcedColors: Columns, cards, grabbed state, errors, controls, Beta label, and focus map to system colors.
preferences.reducedMotion: Focus recovery uses behavior auto and card state transitions become immediate.
preferences.rtl: Logical layout and cross-column keyboard direction mirror while within-column order remains stable.

limitations: Kanban cannot progress beyond Beta until physical iOS VoiceOver and Android TalkBack task sessions pass.
Source-present-unreleased evidence does not yet include generated parity, packed consumers, scale performance, or complete manual assistive-technology sessions.
Consumers own durable server conflict resolution, authorization, collaborative locking, and business-specific WIP policy.
